title: Restore original logo in Layout header

requirements.summary: Restore the logo in the Layout component header to its original appearance before Version 16 by reverting unintended changes to the logo image source, size, styling, or text
acceptanceCriteria: The logo displayed in the sticky header matches the original logo design prior to Version 16 changes.
No other header or navigation elements are affected by the fix.
The logo renders correctly on both desktop and mobile layouts.

file_operations.description: Inspect the current logo markup in the sticky header and revert any unintended changes to the logo image source (verify correct asset path from frontend/public/assets/generated/dairy-logo.dim_200x60.png or frontend/public/assets/generated/ao-farms-logo.dim_320x160.png), size attributes, styling classes, or accompanying text that were introduced in Version 16. Ensure the logo uses the correct original asset and styling without altering navigation links or other Layout functionality.
